lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hi, can I help?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Welcome to Burthorpe Castle! Home to his Royal Highness the Prince of Burthorpe, Heir to the Throne of Asgarnia!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is the prince?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: We do not disclose his majesty's business.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Yes actually I do, we need another servant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does this noble quest have a name?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Yes, it's the... er... Empty the Cesspit Quest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give it a miss!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.
